---
title: "Teaching"
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-single">
  <div class="content">

    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-label">Teaching</div>
      <div class="about-text">
        I have served as sole instructor of record for the following undergraduate courses at the University of Texas at Dallas.
      </div>
    </section>

    <section class="section reveal">
      <div class="section-subhead">Courses Taught</div>

      <div class="course">
        <div class="course-code">PSCI 4396</div>
        <div class="course-title">International Trade Policy</div>
        <div class="course-meta"><a href="syllabus_PSCI4396_120125.pdf">Syllabus</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="course">
        <div class="course-code">PSCI 4314</div>
        <div class="course-title">Political Economy of East Asia</div>
        <div class="course-meta"><a href="syllabus_PSCI4314_042125.pdf">Syllabus</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="course">
        <div class="course-code">PSCI 3328</div>
        <div class="course-title">International Relations</div>
        <div class="course-meta"><a href="syllabus_PSCI3328_011926.pdf">Syllabus</a></div>
      </div>
      <div class="course">
        <div class="course-code">EPPS 2301</div>
        <div class="course-title">Research Design in the Social and Policy Sciences</div>
        <div class="course-meta"><a href="syllabus_EPPS2301_092724.pdf">Syllabus</a></div>
      </div>
    </section>

  </div>
</div>

<footer>
  <p class="footer-text">&copy; 2026 Giuseppe Peressotti</p>
</footer>
```
